visa_types.name: Incentive Groups
visa_types.visa_fees:
Dear Applicants, Travel Agents and Representatives, please view the revised Visa Fees and VFS Service fees applicable from 01 June 2026.

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Visa Fees 1]

The only acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by Demand Draft in Indian Rupees (INR). Demand Draft should be drawn in favor of “Embassy of Austria” and be payable at New Delhi.
There is a bank counter available at VFS office to assist applicants prepare their visa fees demand draft with an additional NPR 1250/-
VFS Service Fees will be accepted in Cash/QR/Online.
VFS service charge and two-way courier fee:
Apart from the visa fee, a VFS service charge inclusive of VAT of 6046 NPR and two-way courier fee of 2670 NPR per application will be levied for applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre.
For the VFS Global additional services for visa applicants, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/aut/premium-services)
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
An Incentive Visa is given those who are applying for Group/Incentive in Austria.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
An Incentive Visa is given those who are applying for Group/Incentive in Austria.

## Visa Fees
Dear Applicants, Travel Agents and Representatives, please view the revised Visa Fees and VFS Service fees applicable from 01 June 2026.

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Visa Fees 1]

The only acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by Demand Draft in Indian Rupees (INR). Demand Draft should be drawn in favor of “Embassy of Austria” and be payable at New Delhi.
There is a bank counter available at VFS office to assist applicants prepare their visa fees demand draft with an additional NPR 1250/-
VFS Service Fees will be accepted in Cash/QR/Online.
VFS service charge and two-way courier fee:
Apart from the visa fee, a VFS service charge inclusive of VAT of 6046 NPR and two-way courier fee of 2670 NPR per application will be levied for applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre.
For the VFS Global additional services for visa applicants, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/aut/premium-services)

## Documents Required
Documents Required 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
Schengen Visa Application Form 
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of submission. 
Information and consent declaration 
Austria Visa Application Questionnaire

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work not more than 90 days up to 3 months. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service (AMS) is required.
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work not more than 90 days up to 3 months. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service (AMS) is required.
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees
Dear Applicants, Travel Agents and Representatives, please view the revised Visa Fees and VFS Service fees applicable from 01 June 2026.

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Visa Fees 2]
The only acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by Demand Draft in Indian Rupees (INR). Demand Draft should be drawn in favor of “Embassy of Austria” and be payable at New Delhi.
There is a bank counter available at VFS office to assist applicants prepare their visa fees demand draft with an additional NPR 1250/-
VFS Service Fees will be accepted in Cash/QR/Online.
VFS service charge and two-way courier fee:
Apart from the visa fee, a VFS service charge inclusive of VAT of 6046 NPR and two-way courier fee of 2670 NPR per application will be levied for applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre.
For the VFS Global additional services for visa applicants, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/aut/premium-services)

## Documents Required
Documents Required 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
Schengen Visa Application Form 
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of submission. 
Information and consent declaration 
Austria Visa Application Questionnaire

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Student visas are given to students to pursue regular studies at recognized institutions in Austria for Study more than 90 days and up to 6 months. The visa is multiple entries and valid for the period of study as approved by the educational institution in Austria. Those who intend to work longer than six months should apply for a residency-permit, and not for a visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Student visas are given to students to pursue regular studies at recognized institutions in Austria for Study more than 90 days and up to 6 months. The visa is multiple entries and valid for the period of study as approved by the educational institution in Austria. Those who intend to work longer than six months should apply for a residency-permit, and not for a visa.

## Visa Fees
Dear Applicants, Travel Agents and Representatives, please view the revised Visa Fees and VFS Service fees applicable from 01 June 2026.

[aut > npl > en > Table:Visitor Visa > Visa Fees 1]

The only acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by Demand Draft in Indian Rupees (INR). Demand Draft should be drawn in favor of “Embassy of Austria” and be payable at New Delhi.
There is a bank counter available at VFS office to assist applicants prepare their visa fees demand draft with an additional NPR 1250/-
VFS Service Fees will be accepted only in Cash in Nepalese currency.
VFS service charge and two-way courier fee:
Apart from the visa fee, a VFS service charge inclusive of VAT of 6046 NPR and two-way courier fee of 2670 NPR per application will be levied for applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre.
For the VFS Global additional services for visa applicants, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/aut/premium-services)
All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Documents Required 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
National Visa Category (D) visa form
 As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of submission.
                                                                    
Information and consent declaration
Austria Visa Application -Questionnaire

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A Visitor visa is provided for those who are visiting family / friends in Austria. The inviter has to provide a guarantee on behalf of the applicant for this visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A Visitor visa is provided for those who are visiting family / friends in Austria. The inviter has to provide a guarantee on behalf of the applicant for this visa.

## Visa Fees
Dear Applicants, Travel Agents and Representatives, please view the revised Visa Fees and VFS Service fees applicable from 01 June 2026.

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Visa Fees 1]

The only acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by Demand Draft in Indian Rupees (INR). Demand Draft should be drawn in favor of “Embassy of Austria” and be payable at New Delhi.
There is a bank counter available at VFS office to assist applicants prepare their visa fees demand draft with an additional NPR 1250/-
VFS Service Fees will be accepted in Cash/QR/Online.
VFS service charge and two-way courier fee:
Apart from the visa fee, a VFS service charge inclusive of VAT of 6046 NPR and two-way courier fee of 2670 NPR per application will be levied for applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre.
For the VFS Global additional services for visa applicants, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/aut/premium-services)

## Documents Required
Documents Required 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
Schengen Visa Application Form 
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of submission. 
Information and consent declaration 
Austria Visa Application Questionnaire

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Student visas are given to students to pursue regular studies at recognized institutions in Austria for Study more than 90 days and up to 6 months. The visa is multiple entries and valid for the period of study as approved by the educational institution in Austria. Those who intend to work longer than six months should apply for a residency-permit, and not for a visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Student visas are given to students to pursue regular studies at recognized institutions in Austria for Study more than 90 days and up to 6 months. The visa is multiple entries and valid for the period of study as approved by the educational institution in Austria. Those who intend to work longer than six months should apply for a residency-permit, and not for a visa.

## Visa Fees
Dear Applicants, Travel Agents and Representatives, please view the revised Visa Fees and VFS Service fees applicable from 01 June 2026.

[aut > npl > en > Table:Visitor Visa > Visa Fees 1]

VFS service charge and two-way courier fee:
Apart from the visa fee, a VFS service charge inclusive of VAT of 6046 NPR and two-way courier fee of 2670 NPR per application will be levied for applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre.
For the VFS Global additional services for visa applicants, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/aut/premium-services)
All fees are non-refundable.

This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
